arts.ttl: Brentford transfer news: Mads Roerslev attracting loan interest from Bundesliga club?
arts.sum: Brentford defender Mads Roerslev is reportedly attracting interest from Bundesliga club Wolfsburg, who are in talks over a potential deal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool get major selection boost for Brentford as key man remains sidelined
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool team news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'disappointed' with draw at title-chasing Forest - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says his team "should be disappointed" despite the Premier League leaders coming from behind to draw at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract update: Liverpool star eyed as Neymar heir in summer transfer window
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is reportedly set to be the subject of a monumental offer from abroad, with the Liverpool star set to leave Anfield for free at the end of the season.
Former Liverpool goalkeeper Loris Karius joins German second-tier side Schalke until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool have been a team of two halves this season
arts.sum: The 23 shots at goal from the Premier League leaders was the most Nottingham Forest have faced in a match this season. It followed back-to-back underwhelming performances against Manchester United in the league and Spurs in the EFL Cup, and noises about Liverpool hitting their first real dip in form this season will have been getting louder when they trailed Nottingham Forest at half-time.

arts.ttl: Why Aston Villa have edge over Liverpool in race for €50m transfer target
arts.sum: Aston Villa are hoping they have the edge over Liverpool in the battle for one of La Liga’s standout stars as the Villains look to continue their transfer business in January. The deal is being led by Villa director Monchi, who signed Bade during his time at Sevilla, and they hope that the Spaniards links to his former club can swing a deal in their favour, with Liverpool believed to be interested also.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah Saudi transfer pressure increases as Sheikh puts Liverpool star in Al-Hilal shirt
arts.sum: Liverpool fans have been sent into bedlam after an image of Mohamed Salah in an Al-Hilal shirt was shared putting further pressure on the Egyptian star

arts.ttl: ‘Five year deal agreed’: Fabrizio Romano shares huge evening transfer development directly impacting Liverpool
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Omar Marmoush is heading to Manchester City, with Liverpool missing out on the Eintracht Frankfurt attacker. The Egyptian has been in red-hot form for the German club this season. In 17 Bundesliga matches, he has scored 15 goals and provided nine assists.
